All The Stylish Things
Shop
Curated retail with upscale goods & services
Explore All Shops
Ballard Designs
Ballard Designs is much more than just a source for beautiful home furnishings and decor. Here, you'll find inspiration, excitement and all the ingredients you need to transform your decorating ideas into reality. Our style is a unique curation of all periods and provenance with a distinctive European influence. We reinterpret classic designs in a contemporary way, so pieces feel at once fresh and timeless. Our designers constantly travel the world in search of new trends in fashion, color and style that we translate into exclusive products you can't find anywhere else. Today, we offer more than 300 pieces you can customize from finish to fabric.
View
Eric Austin Custom
Eric Austin Custom provides custom suiting services and offers ready-to-wear suits, high-end menswear and accessories.
View
Love Train Antiques & Home
In the French antique world, they have a saying: C’est avec du jus. Meaning, it’s with juice. These are the unique pieces you will find at Love Train Antiques & Home. Select items from around the world that show the passage of time and have been steeped in their own juices.
View
Swan Space
Swan Space is an artisanal, sensory boutique environment dedicated to the beauty of transformation. Discover a curated balance of specialty apparel, natural fragrances, crystals, artisanal jewelry, vintage and antique finds, and bespoke artisans & brands.
View
Woof Gang Bakery & Grooming
Woof Gang Bakery & Grooming is the leader in professional pet grooming, and the leading specialty retailer of pet food and supplies in the country. They pride themselves on creating a warm, loving, and fun environment for pets and their owners to enjoy. Visit their store to see their paw-mazing selection of delicious handmade, oven baked treats, premium food, and other products, or book an appointment with one of their groomers to keep your pup looking and feeling their best!
View
All The Tasty Things
Food Hall
Chattahoochee Food Works
Explore CFW
Chattahoochee Food Works
Located in the heart of Atlanta’s Upper Westside, Chattahoochee Food Works is the 31-vendor, 25,000 square-foot foodhall featured at the center of The Works. Highlighting the best of Atlanta’s exciting food scene, the food hall will feature restaurant stalls, creative chef concepts, and the region’s top culinary talent. The space also includes a large communal indoor/outdoor bar and expansive outdoor seating. Celebrity chef Andrew Zimmern and partner Robert Montwaid, creator of New York’s Gansevoort Market, are the curators behind Chattahoochee Food Works.
View
Flora D’Italia
Flora D’Italia specializes in fresh, handmade pasta, authentic Neapolitan-style pizza, and a variety of sandwiches, salads, and classic dishes like eggplant and chicken Parmesan. Led by Michelin-starred Chef Steven Ferdinand, Flora D’Italia embodies elevated simplicity and a respect for prime ingredients. Every dish reflects Chef Ferdinand’s dedication to flavor and quality, offering an exquisite taste of Italy in every bite. Join us at Flora D’Italia for a memorable dining experience that combines tradition with modern elegance.
View
Mochinut Atlanta
Mochinut brings a delicious twist to the traditional donut with its signature mochi donut—a unique fusion of American doughnuts and Japanese mochi that originated in Hawaii. Known for its distinctive shape and irresistible texture, each mochi donut features a light, crispy exterior and a soft, chewy center.
View
Papin’s Bites
Papins Bites is a family restaurant born from the vibrant street food culture of Bogota, Colombia. Proudly hailing from Bogota, they envisioned a dream to bring the essence of their beloved city’s street cuisine to the American market. Their menu features classic dishes enjoyed by workers during their shifts, students studying near their campuses, families gathering on weekends, and friends looking to share memorable moments. They aim to showcase a slice of rich culture, offering delectable, high-quality dishes that will undoubtedly satisfy customers. Join them on a culinary journey that captures the spirit of Bogota.
View
Saigon Street Food
Experience the authentic taste of Vietnam with Saigon Street Food.
View
What the Fry!
What the Fry is a gourmet french fry food stall located inside Chattahoochee Food Works.
View
Delilah’s Everyday Soul
When Oprah Winfrey voted chef and owner Delilah’s mac and cheese “Best in the Nation,” it was all the motivation Delilah needed to continue to cook and share her food with the rest of the world. This acclaimed Philadelphia restaurateur has been featured on Food Network’s Throwdown with Bobby Flay, and the CBS series, Chef on a Shoestring. Delilah, and her daughter, Delana will open Delilah’s Everyday Soul in early fall at Chattahoochee Food Works. The ladies offer the tastiest fried chicken, mac and cheese, and other southern favorites such as fried green tomatoes, homemade chips, and strawberry lemonade daily.
View
La Tropical
Welcome to La Tropical, nestled inside Chattahoochee Food Works, where they serve the heart and soul of Puerto Rican, Cuban, and Latin cuisine! Savor the rich flavors of classic dishes like Cuban Sandwiches, Bacalaitos, Mofongo, Carne Frita, Arroz con Pollo, and Ropa Vieja. Crafted by renowned celebrity chef Roberto Trevino and brought to life by chef Minelly Amador, their menu promises authenticity and warmth in every bite. Experience a culinary journey that is as vibrant and welcoming as the tropical islands themselves. Come indulge in the true essence of Latin culinary traditions at La Tropical.
View
Doug’s North Carolina BBQ
Eastern North Carolina is well known for its unique vinegar-based BBQ. While growing up in Greenville, NC, owner Doug mastered his skill of smoking whole hogs as a helper to his grandfather Alfonza Weaver, who was known throughout the area for producing the best pulled pork! Eventually Doug found his niche smoking whole turkeys while exploring healthier alternatives to the traditional pork-based BBQ.
Doug officially entered the food service industry with the launch of his food truck in Fayetteville, NC in 2017. In 2023, Doug partnered with his cousin, Dr. William Hill, a longtime resident of Atlanta, GA to bring this unique family recipe to the soul of Atlanta.
View
Mushi Ni
Mushi Ni is an Asian American eatery steeped in tradition with a modern flair, offering snacks, baos, dumplings, and rice bowls.
View
Philly G Steaks
Philly G Steaks offers an authentic, ribeye Philly Cheese Steak or Chicken Cheese Steak created by Philadelphia-born Gordon Brown. Gordon currently owns another location located at Sweet Auburn Curb Market.
View
Fuzzy’s Raw Bar
Fuzzy's is a raw bar offering seafood, oysters, and a good time. Guests can dine at the counter while watching the chefs at work.
View
Patty & Frank’s
Patty & Franks opened their very first location at Chattahoochee Food Works. All the ground beef for their burgers is a premium custom blend from Pat LaFrieda Meat Company. Their hot dogs are an all natural, 100% heritage Piedmontese beef recipe developed by Andrew Zimmern and Pat LaFrieda. Their award-winning, world-famous chili is made from scratch. Their gravy and Patty Sauce are made the same way, always fresh, from their own kitchen.
View
Bánh Mì Station
Banh Mi Station, located at The Works, serves gourmet Vietnamese street food with a French influence. Come enjoy fresh and delicious traditional fair made with the highest quality ingredients in a beautiful and fun atmosphere.
View
Belen de la Cruz – Empanadas & Pastries
Belen de la Cruz landed in Atlanta and finally felt it was the right place for her to pursue her long-time entrepreneurial dream of opening Belen de la Cruz – Empanadas & Pastries. All of Belen's empanadas are made with high quality ingredients and no preservatives added. Options are meat, vegetarian, and gluten free. Every recipe incorporates the home made flavors from her home in Argentina.
View
Munster Cravings
Munster Cravings, owned and created by Veronica Dalzon, are the freshest, handcrafted cookies Atlanta has ever tasted. Veronica has been known to say that her cookies are even better than your grandmother’s cookies! Addicting cookie flavors such as PB&J, Strawberry Shortcake, Cookies & Cream, or the vibrantly colored Bam Bam cookie, topped off with fruity cereal, are just a few customer favorites.
View
All The Foodie Things
Dine
The best of Atlanta’s food & beverage scene
Explore Restaurants
Chicheria Mexican Kitchen
Chicheria Mexican Kitchen brings a fun, fresh, and vibrant Mexican dining experience to The Works in Atlanta’s Upper Westside. Indulge in hand-pressed, blue corn tortillas made fresh daily, sip on hand-crafted margaritas, and experience the magic of their Baja-inspired menu created by Bravo TV’s “Top Chef” alum Whitney Otawaka and Executive Chef Juan Hormiga.
View
Fox Bros Bar-B-Q
Growing up in Texas, twin brothers Jonathan and Justin Fox were inspired by Texas heat and southern spice. After moving from Fort Worth to Atlanta, Justin and Jonathan were homesick for Texas-style barbecue and after being unable to find the flavors they grew up with, the twin brothers decided to take matters into their own hands. With no professional training, Jonathan and Justin began throwing backyard gatherings for friends and family to test out their barbecue skills. Small gatherings grew into cooking for over 250 people, a barbecue catering operation was born. After a pop-up stint at Smith's Olde Bar in 2005 where Fox Brothers was named "Runner-up Best Barbecue in Atlanta", the brothers decided to open their own restaurant.
View
